chapter_title: OF CONTRACTS, VOIDABLE CONTRACTS AND VOID AGREEMENTS
section_title: Every agreement by which any one is restrained from exercising a lawful
content:
27. Every agreement by which any one is restrained from exercising a lawful
in restraint
profession, trade or business of any kind, is to that extent void.
